title: Microsoft unveils new AI models to lessen reliance on OpenAI and lower costs for developers
summary_full: At its Build developer conference, Microsoft announced a series of generative AI models to try and crack a market controlled by OpenAI, Anthropic and Google.
summary_public: At its Build developer conference, Microsoft announced a series of generative AI models to try and crack a market controlled by OpenAI, Anthropic and Google.
